name: BIO-PATH HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Bio-Path Holdings is a clinical and preclinical stage oncology and obesity-focused RNAi nanoparticle drug development company utilizing a novel DNAbilize technology platform for systemic delivery of antisense therapeutics. The company has four drug candidates in development targeting cancer indications including acute myeloid leukemia, lymphoma, solid tumors, and obesity-related metabolic diseases.
sellsTo: Research partners and licensees for DNAbilize platform

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical and preclinical stage oncology and obesity-focused RNAi nanoparticle drug development company utilizing a novel technology that achieves systemic delivery for target-specific protein inhibition for any gene product that is over-expressed in disease.

On December 19, 2024 and March 18, 2025, we announced the results of our initial preclinical work confirming that BP1001-A affected the insulin pathway and increased insulin sensitivity, thus validating BP1001-A as a potential candidate to target obesity in Type 2 diabetes patients.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in second dose cohort of BP1001-A Phase 1/1b clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment is now open for patients for the second dose cohort of 90 mg/m^2 which we expect to be complete in the second quarter of 2025 in order to advance to dose level 3.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in cohorts 1 and 2 of prexigebersen Phase 2 clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to complete enrollment in cohorts 1 and 2 in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 20,800 new cases of acute myeloid leukemia estimated in 2024 in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: The National Cancer Institute estimated that approximately 20,800 new cases occurred in 2024 (Table 1).

tamClaims.claim: 19,680 new cases and 12,740 deaths from ovarian cancer expected in 2024 in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., 19,680 new cases of and 12,740 deaths from ovarian cancer were expected in 2024 (Table 4).

tamClaims.claim: 67,880 new cases and 13,250 deaths from endometrial cancer expected in 2024 in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., 67,880 new cases of and 13,250 deaths from endometrial cancer were expected in 2024 (Table 5).
